rationale: In the citing paper, Villas-Boas and Zhao (2005) is cited in a grouped reference mainly to support a standard modeling assumption (local-monopolist retailer) alongside other prior studies. The paper does not give this citation a distinct role in hypothesis development, mechanism setup, estimation procedure, or interpretation of results beyond that background positioning. Even where ketchup replication is discussed, the text does not clearly tie the core contribution of that replication to this specific cited paper.
